model_comparison: Model 1 demonstrates a superior grasp of the paralinguistic feature 'Disgust'. Model 2 is textually perfect but emotionally safer and flatter, lacking the visceral quality required for 'Disgust'. Although Model 1 has a minor text deviation, its performance on the core requested feature (Emotion) is significantly better and more human-like.
